exercises.title: Stabilizer State Generator
exercises.description: Generate quantum states from their stabilizer generators.
tasks: Generate GHZ state from stabilizers XXX, ZZI, IZZ
Generate Bell state from XX, ZZ

exercises.title: Tableau Implementation
exercises.description: Implement the tableau representation for stabilizer states.
tasks: Convert between Pauli strings and tableau
Test on GHZ and Steane code stabilizers

exercises.title: Graph State Builder
exercises.description: Create graph states from graph specifications.
tasks: Compute stabilizer generators for graph state
Build the state using H and CZ gates
Compare linear, star, and cycle graphs
hints: Generator v: X on v, Z on neighbors

exercises.title: Stabilizer State Enumerator
exercises.description: Enumerate and analyze all stabilizer states for small n.
tasks: Generate all stabilizer states for n=2
hints: Valid = abelian, no -I, n independent generators
Entanglement: check if generators are separable
